title: Overlapping reservations can double-book the same room
body: AvailabilityService.IsRoomAvailable() only compares the new reservation's CheckIn date against existing reservations' CheckIn dates for equality. Two reservations for the same room that overlap but start on different dates (e.g. Jan 10-15 and Jan 12-18) are both accepted, resulting in a double-booked room.

title: Weekend pricing is applied to the entire stay instead of just weekend nights
body: PricingService.CalculateTotal() applies the weekend rate multiplier to the full stay total whenever the stay includes at least one weekend night, instead of applying it only to the nights that actually fall on a weekend. A 5-night stay with a single Saturday is priced as if every night were a weekend night.

title: Cancelled reservations still block the room from being rebooked
body: ReservationService.CancelReservation() removes the reservation from the guest's visible history but never updates its Status to Cancelled, so AvailabilityService still counts it as an active booking and the room stays blocked.

title: Declined payments still confirm the reservation
body: PaymentService.ProcessPayment() sets the reservation status to Confirmed immediately after calling the payment gateway, without checking whether the gateway response indicates success or failure. Declined payments still result in a confirmed reservation.

title: Zero-night reservations pass validation
body: DateRangeValidator.Validate() only checks that CheckOutDate is not earlier than CheckInDate, so a reservation with the same check-in and check-out date (zero nights) passes validation.

title: Failed requests return HTTP 200 with an empty body
body: ExceptionMiddleware catches all unhandled exceptions but only logs them; it never sets a non-success status code or writes an error body, so clients receive an HTTP 200 with an empty response even when the request failed.

title: Any guest can view another guest's reservation by id
body: ReservationsController.GetReservation() fetches a reservation by id and returns it to any authenticated caller, without checking that the reservation's GuestId matches the requesting user, letting any guest view another guest's reservation details by guessing the id.
